body.text: Thesis Proposal was already accepted by @{body('Parse_getAcceptedSupervisor')?['supervisor']?['email']} (@{body('Parse_getProposalAndProposalApplication')?['proposalApplication']?['statusKey']})
You have already rejected/declined this proposal!

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: @{parameters('Department (uzhbf_thesisplatform_department_env_var)')} Theses - Your Proposal has been accepted
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Dear @{body('Parse_getProposalAndProposalApplication')?['proposalApplication']?['fullName']},

Your proposal on "@{body('Parse_getProposalAndProposalApplication')?['proposal']?['title']}" has been accepted by a supervisor. Please get in touch with your supervisor "@{triggerBody()?['supervisorEmail']}" to get started with the thesis process (just reply to this email).

Best regards,
@{parameters('Department (uzhbf_thesisplatform_department_env_var)')} Thesis Coordinator

---

Message of your supervisor: @{triggerBody()?['comment']}

parameters.emailMessage/Subject: @{parameters('Department (uzhbf_thesisplatform_department_env_var)')} Theses - Your Proposal has attracted interest
parameters.emailMessage/Body:
Dear @{body('Parse_getProposalAndProposalApplication')?['proposalApplication']?['fullName']},

Your proposal on "@{body('Parse_getProposalAndProposalApplication')?['proposal']?['title']}" has attracted the interest of a supervisor on the condition that the proposal is improved in certain areas. Please review the supervisor feedback, adjust your proposal as needed, and get in touch with your potential supervisor "@{triggerBody()?['supervisorEmail']}" (just reply to this email).

Best regards,
@{parameters('Department (uzhbf_thesisplatform_department_env_var)')} Thesis Coordinator

---

Feedback of your potential supervisor: @{triggerBody()?['comment']}

The proposal "@{body('Parse_getProposalAndProposalApplication')?['proposal']?['title']}" has been declined by "@{triggerBody()?['supervisorEmail']}".

Reason: @{triggerBody()?['reason']}
Comment: @{triggerBody()?['comment']}

The proposal "@{body('Parse_getProposalAndProposalApplication')?['proposal']?['title']}" has been rejected by "@{triggerBody()?['supervisorEmail']}".

Reason: @{triggerBody()?['reason']}
Comment: @{triggerBody()?['comment']}

parameters.request/subject: (@{parameters('Environment (uzhbf_thesisplatform_environment_env_var)')}) Failure in UZH BF Thesis Platform - Thesis Proposal Feedback
